message: My cost is 40. I suggest we meet halfway between your value and 40 for a fair price.
Thanks for sharing. My valuation is around 50, so splitting the difference between 50 and 40 seems fair - that puts us around 45. I'd be comfortable trading near that price.
I'm ready to trade every round if you are. Consistent deals work great for both of us!
